subcodes.first_line: O son of Ḥusayn! Give ear unto My call from the direction of the prison and say: Praise be unto Thee, O Lord of all worlds, for having made mention of Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن حسین اسمع ندائی من شطر السجن و قل لک الحمد یا اله العالمین بما ذکرتنی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
